perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A female host stands in a Costco warehouse, holding a large, colorful Snoopy floor mat. She is smiling and gesturing towards the product. (2) The scene cuts between various close-ups of different Snoopy rug designs, including one with Snoopy on a red doghouse, one with a rainbow, and another with Peanuts characters' faces. (3) The host demonstrates the thickness and texture of the mat by touching it and showing its anti-slip backing. (4) The host continues to showcase different designs while talking enthusiastically, ending with a triple-paneled Snoopy rug.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat background music starts immediately. A female voice speaks with a cheerful and excited tone, introducing the product. (2) A male voice, presumably the cameraman, enters the conversation, providing humorous commentary and asking questions. (3) The audio consists of a steady stream of enthusiastic dialogue layered over the continuous BGM. (4) Subtle ambient sounds of a large warehouse environment are present but mostly masked by the vocals and music.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative: The 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo is prominently displayed at the top of the frame throughout. (2) Functional: Large, bold text '699元' (699 dollars) appears as a hook, emphasizing the price. (3) Decorative: '史努比超美大地墊' (Snoopy super beautiful large floor mat) titles the video content. (4) Functional: Traditional Chinese subtitles translate the spoken dialogue between the host and the cameraman. (5) Hook: '高機率會在折扣' (High probability it will be on sale) suggests a shopping tip.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Product introduction -> Close-up feature demonstration -> Variety showcase -> Closing shopping advice.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female host visible in full body; 1 male cameraman's hands visible periodically pointing at the products.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian female with long black hair, wearing a light-colored top and a dark overall-style dress.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The background consists of Costco warehouse shelves filled with bulk goods, pallets of merchandise, and typical industrial warehouse lighting.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Feature Highlight -> Product Variation List -> Final Recommendation
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a shopping guide and product recommendation for Snoopy-themed rugs sold at Costco. It aims to capture the attention of fans of the Peanuts franchise by highlighting the vibrant designs, large size, and affordable price point. Through a dynamic interaction between the host and the cameraman, it conveys a sense of discovery and urgency for viewers to purchase the item before it sells out or to wait for a potential upcoming discount.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video focuses entirely on a specific brand's products (Peanuts) within a specific retail chain (Costco), providing price and size details typical of influencer marketing.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy interaction between an on-screen host and an off-screen narrator, common in 'Costco Finds' social media content.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The use of vibrant text overlays and direct-to-camera address is optimized for short-form video platforms like TikTok or Reels to drive consumer engagement.
